font-figma.$description: Figma-facing font FAMILY NAMES (bridge-only; never emitted to CSS). The core/font.json stacks are CSS var() chains a Figma text style can't consume, so text-style binding reads real installed family names from here. Classic skin only for now; a medieval override (MedievalSharp / Eagle Lake) is a future per-mode STRING variable — TODO with the Desktop/Mobile mode-axis work.
